stemHtml: A flight is planned to cruise at FL260 to the destination aerodrome, which is 90 minutes away. You are equipped with a VHF radio and a transponder, but you are NOT equipped with data link equipment. Which option is correct about the transmission of routine meteorological observations?

options.a: You are exempted for this aircraft, so NO reports of this kind are required.
options.b: You must report every 15 minutes in the en route phase of the flight.
options.c: This is the correct method for reporting severe weather such as thunderstorm with hail.
options.d: You must report 1 hour after your departure.
